title: Fermented Apple Cider Pancakes
description: A unique twist on traditional pancakes, incorporating fermented flavors and textures.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together pancake mix, fermented apple cider vinegar, apple cider, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together yogurt and eggs.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve warm, topped with your favorite toppings such as maple syrup, fresh fruit, or whipped cream.
